Off Calendar Jan-28-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. The Court sustained Respondent DEPARTMENT OF REAL ESTATE's demurrer to the petition for writ of mandate. Petitioner filed a Statement of Non-Opposition. (JJM/kh) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

Alternative Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Jan-25-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED BY THE COURT -- Plaintiff's petition for an alternative writ of mandate to set aside the order revoking Petitioner's real estate license and directing the issuance of a restricted license is GRANTED -- non-opposition filed. (JJM/KH) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
